name: anxiety
title: best herbal teas for anxiety
description: Avena sativa tea contains bioactive constituents such as avenacosides, avenalol, and ferulic acid that help to treat anxiety by promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels. The calming properties of this herbal tea, including its sedative and anxiolytic effects, make it an effective remedy for alleviating anxiety symptoms.
